name: Manifest
description: Open-source AI model router for agents and apps. Connect your providers to one OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

BETTER_AUTH_URL.description: Public URL for this Heroku app, for example https://your-app-name.herokuapp.com. Use the app name you choose above.

BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.description: Session signing secret. Heroku generates a secure value for you.

MANIFEST_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Separate at-rest encryption key for provider credentials. Heroku generates a secure value for you.

BIND_ADDRESS.description: Bind to all interfaces so Heroku can route traffic to the dyno.

NODE_ENV.description: Run the backend with production settings.

PGSSLMODE.description: Use TLS for Heroku Postgres connections.

DB_POOL_MAX.description: Keep the main database pool below the Essential-0 connection limit.

AUTH_DB_POOL_MAX.description: Keep Better Auth's database pool below the Essential-0 connection limit.
